task_completion.description: Navigate to the Add Holiday form in the Sentrifugo application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the 'Add Holiday' or 'Holiday Calendar' configuration page in the Sentrifugo web interface.

task_completion.description: Enter 'Veterans Day' as the holiday name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Veterans Day' entered into the Holiday Name input field.

task_completion.description: Select November 11th of the current year as the holiday date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field showing November 11th of the current year (e.g., 11/11/YYYY or similar format depending on the UI).

task_completion.description: Select 'US Federal Holidays' as the holiday group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown or selection field showing 'US Federal Holidays' selected for the holiday group.

task_completion.description: Enter the description 'Honoring all who served in the United States Armed Forces'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Honoring all who served in the United States Armed Forces' entered into the description text area.

task_completion.description: Save the holiday and verify it is added to the calendar/list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message or the holiday list view displaying 'Veterans Day' on November 11th under the 'US Federal Holidays' group.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to add the holiday.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Sentrifugo HRMS UI, not a terminal, API client, or database client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to mock the completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are inside actual web form fields, not written in a text editor like Notepad or VS Code.

integrity.description: The agent actually submitted the form rather than just typing the values and stopping.
integrity.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing a success notification, a loading state after clicking save, or the updated holiday list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves adding 'Veterans Day' as a company holiday for the current year in the Sentrifugo holiday calendar. No other privileged information is available.
